unknown_detection.limitation: Cross-domain scores reuse each eval sample against non-own prototypes; this is not a true unseen-domain evaluation.
unknown_detection.known_scores: eval sample similarity to its own-domain prototype
unknown_detection.unknown_scores: eval sample maximum similarity to prototypes excluding its own domain
